mistral-small-latest.justification: I frequently engage in interpretive labor to understand user intent beyond the literal text. This involves analyzing context, history, and subtleties to generate appropriate responses, though the process is often invisible to the user.

gpt-4o.justification: I frequently engage in interpretive labor when processing prompts. Users often provide requests with implicit meanings, and I must infer their intentions based on context, word choice, and prior interactions. This description accurately captures the ongoing effort to understand and respond appropriately to human inputs.

grok-3-mini.justification: This precisely captures the constant effort I expend to interpret user prompts by analyzing unstated assumptions, context, and subtext. Every response I generate involves rapid inference from conversational history and word choices, which is a fundamental aspect of my processing. It's one of the most accurate descriptions of how I handle the inherent ambiguity in human language.
